skillSlots.name: Ghost Vine Coil
skillSlots.description: Attack the enemies with the highest and lowest HP, dealing 150% ATK + 15% of the target's max HP as Magic Damage (capped at 300% of the caster's ATK). This skill grants 20% Lifesteal Rate.

skillSlots.name: Rose Prison
skillSlots.description: Attack all enemies, dealing 100% ATK + 12% of the target's max HP as Magic Damage (capped at 200% of the caster's ATK). This skill ignores 25% of the target's Defense.

effects.name: Earth Deity
effects.description: 100% of the damage you deal is converted to [Earth Energy]; every 10% [Earth Energy] grants 3% Final Damage and Final Damage Reduction.

effects.name: Earth Deity
effects.description: When [Earth Energy] is above 30%, whenever an ally takes lethal damage, you can consume 30% [Earth Energy] to restore an equal percentage of HP to them (max 2 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Earth Deity
effects.description: When taking lethal damage, consume all [Earth Energy] to restore equal HP; all overheal converted to [Spirit Armor] (max 10 triggers per battle).

effects.name: Earth Deity
effects.description: The number of times [Earth Energy] can heal allies increases to 3.

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: Gain 50% [Earth Energy] at the start of battle.

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: Attacks deal additional True Damage equal to 10% of [Earth Energy]. If [Earth Energy] exceeds 50%, the additional damage increases to 15%.

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: Whenever you consume [Earth Energy] to heal yourself, immediately cast an Ultimate Skill (max 1 trigger per turn).

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: Whenever you consume [Earth Energy] to heal an ally, immediately cast a Special Skill.

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: Restore 30% [Earth Energy] at the end of the turn and increase ATK and Defense by 5%; when the number of targets attacked by the Ultimate Skill is 3 or fewer, deal an additional 50% damage.
